text: Context: Data on participation and performance trends in single stage Ironman triathlons such as Ironman Hawaii have been reported, but there is no information available on multi-stage ultra-triathlons, like Ultraman Hawaii, covering 515 km. This study aims to investigate: 1) changes in participation and performance in an ultra-triathlon competition; 2) sex differences in performance for total and split times; and 3) the age at which athletes achieve the highest performance.
